headline: GO Stock Falls 23% After Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates & Comps Dip Y/Y
summary: Grocery Outlet shares plunge 23% after Q4 earnings and sales miss estimates as comparable sales slip and weaker value perception pressures demand.
